bugs.title: Command Injection in Python Runner
bugs.description: Python execution uses shell-escaped arguments but still allows command injection through crafted arguments
bugs.impact: Remote code execution if attacker controls input
bugs.recommendedFix: Use child_process.spawn instead of exec, implement strict input validation

bugs.title: Path Traversal in Temp File Creation
bugs.description: Temp file creation without proper validation allows path traversal
bugs.impact: Arbitrary file write outside temp directory
bugs.recommendedFix: Validate input data, use secure temp file creation with tmp module

bugs.title: Mocked Prisma Client in Production
bugs.description: Prisma client is completely mocked in production environment
bugs.recommendedFix: Implement proper Prisma client configuration for production

bugs.title: Unsafe Type Assertion
bugs.description: sortFilterValues(group as any) bypasses type system
bugs.recommendedFix: Properly type the group parameter or create a type guard

bugs.title: Multiple Unsafe Type Assertions on State
bugs.impact: Runtime errors from bypassed type checking
bugs.recommendedFix: Define proper interface for layout state

bugs.title: Race Condition in Data Source Store
bugs.description: Event listener is added without cleanup in dataSourceStoreMiddleware
bugs.impact: Memory leaks and race conditions when store is recreated
bugs.recommendedFix: Add cleanup logic to unsubscribe from router events

bugs.title: Vulnerable serialize-javascript Package
bugs.impact: Remote code execution via serialized strings

bugs.title: Vulnerable rollup Package
bugs.impact: Path traversal allowing file writes outside output directory

bugs.title: Development Authentication Bypass
bugs.description: Auto-authentication in development mode bypasses all authentication checks

bugs.title: Middleware Disabled
bugs.description: Middleware is completely disabled (empty matcher), no routes are protected
bugs.impact: All API endpoints accessible without authentication
bugs.recommendedFix: Configure proper route matching for protected endpoints

bugs.title: Stale Closure in Configurator Context
bugs.description: useEffect dependency array is empty but uses variables from closure
bugs.recommendedFix: Add all dependencies to the useEffect array

bugs.title: Unhandled Promise Rejection
bugs.description: initChartStateFromChartEdit call is not wrapped in try/catch
bugs.recommendedFix: Add try/catch block around the async call

bugs.title: Event Listener Not Removed
bugs.description: Event listener is only removed when enabled changes, not on unmount
bugs.recommendedFix: Ensure cleanup runs on unmount regardless of enabled state

bugs.title: No Timeout on Fetch Calls
bugs.description: Multiple fetch calls lack timeout handling

bugs.title: Command Injection in Python Subprocess
bugs.description: Python subprocess execution without input validation
bugs.impact: Command injection via locale or maxInsights parameters
